subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the signs of God! Be thou as a candle amidst the gathering of friends, and with thy flame consume the veils of the people of limitation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بایات الله در جمع دوستان چون شمع برافروز و حجبات اهل امکانرا بشعله
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @knowledge; recognition of God, @symbolism of color and light
